name: Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs round steak, or chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat with onions, salt, pepper, and a little oil.
2. Add diced potatoes and carrots to the pot.
3. Add 1 or 2 cans of cream of mushroom soup and about half as much water.
4. Cook until done - either in the oven, on the stove top, or using a slow cooker.
5. The stew will make its own gravy.
